name: Low-Power Design & Power Intent
description: 低功耗设计:时钟门控、电压域与功耗分析

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['power_design','clock_gating','low_power','voltage_domain','power_analysis'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(clock gating|power gating|low.?power design|voltage domain|ir drop|\bupf\b|\bcpf\b|power intent|dynamic power|leakage power|retention register)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
